overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing an armored character with a large weapon exploring a dark cave system, accompanied by a small companion creature. The character walks through increasingly lit rocky passages, transitioning from deep cave darkness to a bright sunlit canyon exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep cave tunnel with rocky walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dark cave tunnel toward distant light source

notable_agents.action: small companion creature following behind on the left side

entered.detail: dark rocky cave wall with rough texture
dark rocky cave wall receding into distance
uneven dirt and stone floor of the cave
faint blue-white light visible at the end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dark cave tunnel with rough rocky walls on both sides. The ground is uneven dirt and stone. A small companion follows on the left. Ahead, a faint light marks the cave exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: cave passage approaching exit with sky visible ahead

events.description: sky becomes visible through cave opening ahead, illuminating the passage with natural light
character turns slightly to the right while continuing forward, companion moves into clearer view

agents.ego_description: approaching cave exit while looking up at the opening, then turning slightly right

notable_agents.action: companion creature following closely behind, illuminated by the increasing light

entered.detail: rocky cave ceiling visible as the camera tilts upward
bright blue sky visible through the cave exit

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the cave exit where bright sky becomes visible ahead, changing the lighting from dark to mixed. The camera tilts up to show the rocky ceiling and opening. The character turns slightly right while the companion follows closely behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with sunlight filtering in

events.description: exits enclosed cave into semi-open canyon passage with natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through sunlit rocky passage, navigating around boulders

entered.detail: rock wall illuminated by direct sunlight streaming from above
scattered boulders blocking parts of the path
narrow passage between high rock walls leading forward

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a transitional rocky area where sunlight filters in, illuminating the walls. Large boulders scatter the path ahead. The enclosed cave gives way to a semi-open canyon passage with high rock walls on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon exit opening to bright outdoor landscape

events.description: emerging into full bright sunlight as the canyon opens up
approaching the final exit from the canyon into the open world

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bright canyon exit, approaching open landscape

entered.detail: large opening at the end of the canyon leading to open terrain
fully visible bright sky with daylight
rock formations visible in the distance beyond the exit
expansive outdoor terrain visible through the canyon exit

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the final canyon exit into bright daylight. The walls fall away to reveal a fully open landscape ahead with distant rock formations. The lighting shifts dramatically to natural direct sunlight as the character nears the end of the canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, oppressive cave system that gradually opens into a bright, sunlit canyon. It begins with the character and a small companion navigating a narrow tunnel of rough rocky walls and uneven stone, moving toward a faint light in the distance. As the character approaches the exit, the camera tilts upward to reveal the opening ceiling, shifting the lighting from deep shadow to a mixed glow. The scene then expands into a semi-open canyon passage where sunlight filters through the high walls and illuminates scattered boulders. Finally, the rocky walls fall away completely as the character emerges into a fully open landscape of distant rock formations under direct, brilliant daylight.
